name: Velvet Alocasia Plant - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of refreshing and fuss-free greenery to your home with this Velvet Alocasia Plant from Threshold™. This decorative plant showcases green Alocasia leaves arranged together to bring a lovely, natural look to your decor, and it comes housed inside a ceramic pot for easy display. Best of all, the polyester faux floral and foam filler means it stays beautiful without the hassle of watering or pruning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
